tasks.subject: Task 3b: AddressPolicy + per-endpoint SSRF controls
tasks.description:
Shared AddressPolicy (two-gate: private denylist needs allow_private_network; allowlist narrows only). Adds allow_private_network + allowed_networks columns; validator delegates to policy.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrate/20260704000001_create_angarium_endpoints.rb","lib/angarium/address_policy.rb","app/validators/angarium/endpoint_url_validator.rb","app/models/angarium/endpoint.rb","test/lib/angarium/address_policy_test.rb"],"verifyCommand":"bin/rails test test/lib/angarium/address_policy_test.rb test/models/angarium/endpoint_test.rb","requiresUserVerification":false}
```
